tasks.description: Add an auto follow-up cron to services/prospect-pipeline.js that queries the prospect_sites table for prospects whose status is 'emailed' and whose last_contacted date is either 3 or 7 days ago, then calls POST /api/v1/sites/follow-up for each one. Expose it as a scheduled function that can be triggered by an external cron (e.g. node -e "import('./services/prospect-pipeline.js').then(m => m.runFollowUpCron())"). Log every send attempt to the outreach_log table.

Add a prospect scoring function to services/prospect-pipeline.js called scoreProspect(prospectId) that reads the scraped website data for a prospect from prospect_sites, scores it on a 0-100 scale based on: missing mobile responsiveness (-20), no HTTPS (-20), no booking link (-20), page load score from Lighthouse if available (-20), outdated design indicators like table layouts or inline styles (-20). Store the score in a new 'website_score' integer column on prospect_sites (add migration SQL in db/migrations/20260313_add_website_score.sql) and expose it via GET /api/v1/sites/prospects sorted by score ascending so worst websites surface first.

Add a preview site expiry cleanup function to services/site-builder.js called cleanupExpiredPreviews() that queries prospect_sites for rows where status is not 'converted' and created_at is older than 30 days, then deletes the directory at public/previews/{clientId}/ for each expired prospect and marks the row status as 'expired' in the database. Expose it as an exported async function that can be called from an external cron.

Add GET /api/v1/builder/receipts endpoint to routes/auto-builder-routes.js that queries the build_artifacts table and returns the last 20 rows ordered by created_at DESC as JSON array with fields: id, component, status, files_modified, created_at. Requires x-command-center-key header for auth.

Add POST /api/v1/builder/enqueue endpoint to routes/auto-builder-routes.js that accepts JSON body { description, ssotRef } and inserts a row into the execution_tasks table with type='build', status='pending', payload=JSON.stringify({description, ssotRef}), created_at=NOW(). Returns { ok: true, taskId } on success. Requires x-command-center-key header for auth.
